title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, allowed in OS settings, new UI
scenario: Notifications UI does not update after enabling notifications via OS settings from the Poly Studio Mobile app's General settings
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and begin onboarding.
2. When prompted for notification permissions, select "Don't Allow".
3. Complete onboarding and land on the Home screen.
4. Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications.
5. Tap the Notifications toggle switch to turn it ON.
6. Tap "Go to Settings" to navigate to the OS notification settings for the app.
7. Enable notifications for Poly Studio Mobile in the OS settings.
8. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
9. Observe the Notifications screen in App Settings → General → Notifications.
expected: All notification settings should be unlocked and set to ON, and the user should be able to change individual notification settings.
